TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Paiwan Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://pwn.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_pwn, title = {Paiwan Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://pwn.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: Xinyi Xinyi gu icuwa i Nantou. ala atjunangn mapuljat 1,423.52 km² (ma'linpan atjunang 1,067.28 km², ma'linaule atjunang 113.33 km²). ala caucau mapuljat 12,373 caucau, ala daceneqlan mapuljat 3,695 a daceneqlan, Bunun (76%) a maqcuwa caucau. kinaizuazua a qinaljan nua sebunun a kacalisiyan aicu a nehunpu a kadjunangan. izua caucau a cou uta. tjatjuruvu a caucau imaza a bunun. imaza izua kakaian na bunun kata cou. kadjunangan izua gadu a saviah kata gadugaduan i vecekadan tua taiwan imaza. pasaviri ta paran (ren'ai gu) kata qabizay (yuchi gu); pasakacedas ta malibasi (wanrung gu) na kalinku king‎; pasakaledep ta cuili (shuili gu), kiuⁿ-á-liâu (lugu gu), kata lîm-kí-poo (zhushan lizuk); pasanavalj ta ngani (taoyuan gu) na takaw(kaohsiung king). kasicuayan cuaicuayanga a pinaljavakan nia dripung a sinkaw gu na taichung ciu ta qinaljan kata kadjunangan imaza. tjaivililj ta kacavilj a 1945, sipaljavaljavak na sihu nia ciukuk tamaza a luna gu saka xinyi gu tucu. na qivu a pinaseljangan na qinaljan sekacalisian i taiwan tu semekez a siayaya tamaza a xinyi nu i kacaviljan a 2014. cempeliv a caucau ta pinapungadan a kadjunangan tamaza a nehunpu. caucau paljavak tua atjunang matja 14 qinaljan i Xinyi. matja 17 qinaljan imaza, Lanngdun , Qapuciu , Tamazuan , Isingan , Laidazuan(malavi) , Naihunpu , Salitung , Sinapalan , Halusipun , Luluna , Qalipusungan , Mahavun (Mamahavunna) , Kalibuan , Tungpu daigaz , Ilausan , Valana , Hanbizan . sinan kilalaing ta xinyi pinaljavakan kinatuluan izua tapuluq saka unem a gakku a kedrikedri imaza. kivangavangan sipacacikelan djalan na kasiya djalan na kasiya i kasikasiw i psoseongana(gadu a alishan) izua ljaljevavavan a dueigaoyue i djalan a cusan(chushan) palidring a djalan sikamasansimuluq saka unem a palidring a djalan na taiwan sikamasansimuluq saka alu a palidring a djalan na taiwan sikamasan 21 palidring a djalan na taiwan sikamasan 56 a palidring a djalan na lamtaw sikamasan 91 a palidring a djalan na lamtaw sikamasan 93 a palidring a djalan na lamtaw sikamasan 95 a palidring a djalan na lamtaw sikamasan 97 a palidring a djalan na lamtaw basu yanlin basu(Yuan Lin Bus Co., Ltd.)
S.PHON: *inji *inji gu iʦuwa i nantuu. aɭa aʦunaŋn mapuʎat *,***.** km* (maʔɭinpan aʦunaŋ *,***.** km*, maʔɭinauɭə aʦunaŋ ***.** km*). aɭa ʦauʦau mapuʎat **,*** ʦauʦau, aɭa daʦənəqɭan mapuʎat *,*** a daʦənəqɭan, bunun (**%) a maqʦuwa ʦauʦau. kinaizuazua a qinaʎan nua səbunun a kaʦaɭisijan aiʦu a nəhunpu a kaɉunaŋan. izua ʦauʦau a ʦuu uta. ʦaʦuruvu a ʦauʦau imaza a bunun. imaza izua kakaian na bunun kata ʦuu. kaɉunaŋan izua gadu a saviah kata gadugaduan i vəʦəkadan tua taiwan imaza. pasaviri ta paran (rənʔai gu) kata qabizaj (juʦhi gu); pasakaʦədas ta maɭibasi (wanruŋ gu) na kaɭinku kiŋ*; pasakaɭədəp ta ʦuiɭi (shuiɭi gu), kiu*-*-ɭi*u (ɭugu gu), kata ɭ*m-k*-puu (zhushan ɭizuk); pasanavaʎ ta ŋani (taujuan gu) na takaw(kauhsiuŋ kiŋ). kasiʦuajan ʦuaiʦuajaŋa a pinaʎavakan nia ɖipuŋ a sinkaw gu na taiʦhuŋ ʦiu ta qinaʎan kata kaɉunaŋan imaza. ʦaiviɭiʎ ta kaʦaviʎ a ****, sipaʎavaʎavak na sihu nia ʦiukuk tamaza a ɭuna gu saka *inji gu tuʦu. na qivu a pinasəʎaŋan na qinaʎan səkaʦaɭisian i taiwan tu səməkəz a siajaja tamaza a *inji nu i kaʦaviʎan a ****. ʦəmpəɭiv a ʦauʦau ta pinapuŋadan a kaɉunaŋan tamaza a nəhunpu. ʦauʦau paʎavak tua aʦunaŋ maʦa ** qinaʎan i *inji. maʦa ** qinaʎan imaza, ɭanŋdun , qapuʦiu , tamazuan , isiŋan , ɭaidazuan(maɭavi) , naihunpu , saɭituŋ , sinapaɭan , haɭusipun , ɭuɭuna , qaɭipusuŋan , mahavun (mamahavunna) , kaɭibuan , tuŋpu daigaz , iɭausan , vaɭana , hanbizan . sinan kiɭaɭaiŋ ta *inji pinaʎavakan kinatuɭuan izua tapuɭuq saka unəm a gakku a kəɖikəɖi imaza. kivaŋavaŋan sipaʦaʦikəɭan ɉaɭan na kasija ɉaɭan na kasija i kasikasiw i psusəuŋana(gadu a aɭishan) izua ʎaʎəvavavan a duəigaujuə i ɉaɭan a ʦusan(ʦhushan) paɭiɖiŋ a ɉaɭan sikamasansimuɭuq saka unəm a paɭiɖiŋ a ɉaɭan na taiwan sikamasansimuɭuq saka aɭu a paɭiɖiŋ a ɉaɭan na taiwan sikamasan ** paɭiɖiŋ a ɉaɭan na taiwan sikamasan ** a paɭiɖiŋ a ɉaɭan na ɭamtaw sikamasan ** a paɭiɖiŋ a ɉaɭan na ɭamtaw sikamasan ** a paɭiɖiŋ a ɉaɭan na ɭamtaw sikamasan ** a paɭiɖiŋ a ɉaɭan na ɭamtaw sikamasan ** a paɭiɖiŋ a ɉaɭan na ɭamtaw basu janɭin basu(juan ɭin bus ʦu., ɭtd.)
S.FORM: Xinyi Xinyi gu icuwa i Nantou. ala atjunangn mapuljat 1,423.52 km² (ma'linpan atjunang 1,067.28 km², ma'linaule atjunang 113.33 km²). ala caucau mapuljat 12,373 caucau, ala daceneqlan mapuljat 3,695 a daceneqlan, Bunun (76%) a maqcuwa caucau. kinaizuazua a qinaljan nua sebunun a kacalisiyan aicu a nehunpu a kadjunangan. izua caucau a cou uta. tjatjuruvu a caucau imaza a bunun. imaza izua kakaian na bunun kata cou. kadjunangan izua gadu a saviah kata gadugaduan i vecekadan tua taiwan imaza. pasaviri ta paran (ren'ai gu) kata qabizay (yuchi gu); pasakacedas ta malibasi (wanrung gu) na kalinku king‎; pasakaledep ta cuili (shuili gu), kiuⁿ-á-liâu (lugu gu), kata lîm-kí-poo (zhushan lizuk); pasanavalj ta ngani (taoyuan gu) na takaw(kaohsiung king). kasicuayan cuaicuayanga a pinaljavakan nia dripung a sinkaw gu na taichung ciu ta qinaljan kata kadjunangan imaza. tjaivililj ta kacavilj a 1945, sipaljavaljavak na sihu nia ciukuk tamaza a luna gu saka xinyi gu tucu. na qivu a pinaseljangan na qinaljan sekacalisian i taiwan tu semekez a siayaya tamaza a xinyi nu i kacaviljan a 2014. cempeliv a caucau ta pinapungadan a kadjunangan tamaza a nehunpu. caucau paljavak tua atjunang matja 14 qinaljan i Xinyi. matja 17 qinaljan imaza, Lanngdun , Qapuciu , Tamazuan , Isingan , Laidazuan(malavi) , Naihunpu , Salitung , Sinapalan , Halusipun , Luluna , Qalipusungan , Mahavun (Mamahavunna) , Kalibuan , Tungpu daigaz , Ilausan , Valana , Hanbizan . sinan kilalaing ta xinyi pinaljavakan kinatuluan izua tapuluq saka unem a gakku a kedrikedri imaza. kivangavangan sipacacikelan djalan na kasiya djalan na kasiya i kasikasiw i psoseongana(gadu a alishan) izua ljaljevavavan a dueigaoyue i djalan a cusan(chushan) palidring a djalan sikamasansimuluq saka unem a palidring a djalan na taiwan sikamasansimuluq saka alu a palidring a djalan na taiwan sikamasan 21 palidring a djalan na taiwan sikamasan 56 a palidring a djalan na lamtaw sikamasan 91 a palidring a djalan na lamtaw sikamasan 93 a palidring a djalan na lamtaw sikamasan 95 a palidring a djalan na lamtaw sikamasan 97 a palidring a djalan na lamtaw basu yanlin basu(Yuan Lin Bus Co., Ltd.)
S.PHON: *inji *inji gu iʦuwa i nantuu. aɭa aʦunaŋn mapuʎat *,***.** km* (maʔɭinpan aʦunaŋ *,***.** km*, maʔɭinauɭə aʦunaŋ ***.** km*). aɭa ʦauʦau mapuʎat **,*** ʦauʦau, aɭa daʦənəqɭan mapuʎat *,*** a daʦənəqɭan, bunun (**%) a maqʦuwa ʦauʦau. kinaizuazua a qinaʎan nua səbunun a kaʦaɭisijan aiʦu a nəhunpu a kaɉunaŋan. izua ʦauʦau a ʦuu uta. ʦaʦuruvu a ʦauʦau imaza a bunun. imaza izua kakaian na bunun kata ʦuu. kaɉunaŋan izua gadu a saviah kata gadugaduan i vəʦəkadan tua taiwan imaza. pasaviri ta paran (rənʔai gu) kata qabizaj (juʦhi gu); pasakaʦədas ta maɭibasi (wanruŋ gu) na kaɭinku kiŋ*; pasakaɭədəp ta ʦuiɭi (shuiɭi gu), kiu*-*-ɭi*u (ɭugu gu), kata ɭ*m-k*-puu (zhushan ɭizuk); pasanavaʎ ta ŋani (taujuan gu) na takaw(kauhsiuŋ kiŋ). kasiʦuajan ʦuaiʦuajaŋa a pinaʎavakan nia ɖipuŋ a sinkaw gu na taiʦhuŋ ʦiu ta qinaʎan kata kaɉunaŋan imaza. ʦaiviɭiʎ ta kaʦaviʎ a ****, sipaʎavaʎavak na sihu nia ʦiukuk tamaza a ɭuna gu saka *inji gu tuʦu. na qivu a pinasəʎaŋan na qinaʎan səkaʦaɭisian i taiwan tu səməkəz a siajaja tamaza a *inji nu i kaʦaviʎan a ****. ʦəmpəɭiv a ʦauʦau ta pinapuŋadan a kaɉunaŋan tamaza a nəhunpu. ʦauʦau paʎavak tua aʦunaŋ maʦa ** qinaʎan i *inji. maʦa ** qinaʎan imaza, ɭanŋdun , qapuʦiu , tamazuan , isiŋan , ɭaidazuan(maɭavi) , naihunpu , saɭituŋ , sinapaɭan , haɭusipun , ɭuɭuna , qaɭipusuŋan , mahavun (mamahavunna) , kaɭibuan , tuŋpu daigaz , iɭausan , vaɭana , hanbizan . sinan kiɭaɭaiŋ ta *inji pinaʎavakan kinatuɭuan izua tapuɭuq saka unəm a gakku a kəɖikəɖi imaza. kivaŋavaŋan sipaʦaʦikəɭan ɉaɭan na kasija ɉaɭan na kasija i kasikasiw i psusəuŋana(gadu a aɭishan) izua ʎaʎəvavavan a duəigaujuə i ɉaɭan a ʦusan(ʦhushan) paɭiɖiŋ a ɉaɭan sikamasansimuɭuq saka unəm a paɭiɖiŋ a ɉaɭan na taiwan sikamasansimuɭuq saka aɭu a paɭiɖiŋ a ɉaɭan na taiwan sikamasan ** paɭiɖiŋ a ɉaɭan na taiwan sikamasan ** a paɭiɖiŋ a ɉaɭan na ɭamtaw sikamasan ** a paɭiɖiŋ a ɉaɭan na ɭamtaw sikamasan ** a paɭiɖiŋ a ɉaɭan na ɭamtaw sikamasan ** a paɭiɖiŋ a ɉaɭan na ɭamtaw sikamasan ** a paɭiɖiŋ a ɉaɭan na ɭamtaw basu janɭin basu(juan ɭin bus ʦu., ɭtd.)
